summary:
Implemented the next high-value task: keyboard focus behavior for Search and More.

Changed:
- [shared-ui.js](/C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/shared-ui.js:163): added focus restoration.
- [shared-ui.js](/C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/shared-ui.js:2546): More menu now focuses into the menu and returns focus to opener on close/Escape.
- [shared-ui.js](/C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/shared-ui.js:3893): Search now returns focus to opener on close/Escape.
- [tools/audit/Invoke-BrowserSmoke.ps1](/C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/tools/audit/Invoke-BrowserSmoke.ps1:136): browser smoke now checks focus entry, Escape close, and focus return for Search and More.
- [service-worker.js](/C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/service-worker.js:1): bumped cache to `ridgeline-console-v241`.

Verified:
- Ran full audit with screenshots: `Invoke-SiteAudit.ps1 -Tag audit-v241`
- Ran final no-screenshot audit after cache bump: `Invoke-SiteAudit.ps1 -Tag audit-v241-final -SkipScreenshots`
- Both passed for 15 HTML files and the five browser-smoke pages.
- New screenshots are in `debug-screenshots/audit-v241-*.png`.

Updated `AGENT_STATE.md`, `AGENT_BACKLOG.md`, and `SITE_QUALITY_AUDIT.md`. Note: `agent-last-run.json` was already modified when I started and remains unrelated to this work.
